title: crotalaria dura
intro: Crotalaria dura, also known as the yellow crotalaria or kalamansi, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria dura include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria dura include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
